name: Q-9 profile auto-select behavior: scan.sh exits with recognized status when run against a sample tree
command: mkdir -p /tmp/q9-scan && echo "{}" > /tmp/q9-scan/package.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root /tmp/q9-scan 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 2 ] && echo scans 1>&2
